name: fixture/psr4-shared-namespace
description: Two independent packages declare the same PSR-4 prefix (Shared\) and the same class (Shared\Foo) in their respective src/ dirs. Composer aggregates the paths in reverse-sortPackageMap order (root first, then dependents); for two leaf packages with no relative dependency the order is implementation-defined. This fixture pins what Composer 2.8.12 actually emits so bougie has a target.
